subject: Fix: Update arch and flavor in memcached template
commit_message:
Fix: Update arch and flavor in memcached template

When you list images arch shows up empty.
Use V3 flavor over V1.

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33
Change-Id: I587c13ab90a9f2611f1cac8c3a3394be0ef68681
Signed-off-by: Anil Belur <abelur@linuxfoundation.org>
